global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with geometric shapes and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape deal at a low price.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Main graphic shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including an oval and a rectangle, are centered in the ad, rendered in a lighter shade of orange.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional overlapping shapes in varying sizes and shades of orange create depth and interest in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape is positioned towards the center, adding a decorative touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Large rectangle
elements.description: A prominent rectangle shape is placed centrally, serving as a focal point for text placement.

elements.label: Medium circle
elements.description: A medium-sized circle is located near the center, complementing the other shapes in the design.

elements.label: Another rectangle
elements.description: Another rectangle shape is positioned centrally, contributing to the layered visual effect.

elements.label: Text block
elements.description: A text block with the message 'Escape this weekend' is prominently displayed in white, contrasting against the orange background.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: The price '$4.99' is displayed in bold white text, drawing attention as a key selling point.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The phrase 'Start now' is presented in a clear, bold font, encouraging immediate action from viewers.

elements.label: Advertiser name
elements.description: The name 'NomadLayer' is displayed in a smaller font at the top, serving as the brand identifier.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend $4.99 Gat= Start now

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge is positioned at the top right corner, indicating a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, key elements include promotional text and geometric shapes.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Escape this weekend, $4.99, Start now, NomadLayer, SALE
